attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
    FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE
    ,FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 1 then NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 1 then NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 1 then  NODE_LEVEL01_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 2 then NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 2 then NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 2 then  NODE_LEVEL02_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 3 then NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 3 then NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 3 then  NODE_LEVEL03_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 4 then NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 4 then NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 4 then  NODE_LEVEL04_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 5 then NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 5 then NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 5 then  NODE_LEVEL05_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 6 then NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 6 then NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 6 then  NODE_LEVEL06_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 7 then NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 7 then NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 7 then  NODE_LEVEL07_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 8 then NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 8 then NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 8 then  NODE_LEVEL08_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 9 then NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 9 then NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 9 then  NODE_LEVEL09_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 10 then NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 10 then NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 10 then  NODE_LEVEL10_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 11 then NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 11 then NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 11 then  NODE_LEVEL11_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 12 then NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 12 then NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 12 then  NODE_LEVEL12_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 13 then NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 13 then NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 13 then  NODE_LEVEL13_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 14 then NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 14 then NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 14 then  NODE_LEVEL14_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 15 then NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 15 then NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE else NULL  end as  NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE
    ,case when DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT >= 15 then  NODE_LEVEL15_NAME else NULL  end as NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
    ,DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT 
FROM 
(
select
	case 
			when  LEVEL1.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL2.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL3.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL4.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL5.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL6.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL7.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL8.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL9.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL10.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL11.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL12.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL13.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL14.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL15.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL16.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL17.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL18.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL19.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE,1,3)
			when  LEVEL20.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE,1,3) end as  FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE,
case when  LEVEL1.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL2.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL3.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL4.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL5.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL6.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL7.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL8.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL9.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL10.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL11.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL12.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL13.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL14.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL15.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL16.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL17.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL18.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL19.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE,5)
			when  LEVEL20.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  substr (LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE,5) end as  FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
	case 
			when  LEVEL1.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  1
			when  LEVEL2.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  2
			when  LEVEL3.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  3
			when  LEVEL4.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  4
			when  LEVEL5.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  5
			when  LEVEL6.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  6
			when  LEVEL7.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  7
			when  LEVEL8.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  8
			when  LEVEL9.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  9
			when  LEVEL10.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  10
			when  LEVEL11.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  11
			when  LEVEL12.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  12
			when  LEVEL13.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  13
			when  LEVEL14.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  14
			when  LEVEL15.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  15
			when  LEVEL16.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  16
			when  LEVEL17.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  17
			when  LEVEL18.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  18
			when  LEVEL19.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  19
			when  LEVEL20.NODE_TYPE ='D' then  20  end as DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT
    ,LEVEL1.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL01_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL1.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL01_VALUE
    ,LEVEL1.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL01_NAME
    ,LEVEL2.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL02_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL2.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL02_VALUE
    ,LEVEL2.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL02_NAME
    ,LEVEL3.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL03_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL3.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL03_VALUE
    ,LEVEL3.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL03_NAME
    ,LEVEL4.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL04_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL4.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL04_VALUE
    ,LEVEL4.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL04_NAME
    ,LEVEL5.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL05_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL5.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL05_VALUE
    ,LEVEL5.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL05_NAME
    ,LEVEL6.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL06_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL6.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL06_VALUE
    ,LEVEL6.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL06_NAME
    ,LEVEL7.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL07_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL7.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL07_VALUE
    ,LEVEL7.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL07_NAME
    ,LEVEL8.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL08_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL8.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL08_VALUE
    ,LEVEL8.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL08_NAME
    ,LEVEL9.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL09_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL9.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL09_VALUE
    ,LEVEL9.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL09_NAME
    ,LEVEL10.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL10_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL10.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL10_VALUE
    ,LEVEL10.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL10_NAME
    ,LEVEL11.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL11_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL11.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL11_VALUE
    ,LEVEL11.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL11_NAME
    ,LEVEL12.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL12_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL12.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL12_VALUE
    ,LEVEL12.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL12_NAME
    ,LEVEL13.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL13_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL13.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL13_VALUE
    ,LEVEL13.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL13_NAME
    ,LEVEL14.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL14_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL14.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL14_VALUE
    ,LEVEL14.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL14_NAME
    ,LEVEL15.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL15_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL15.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL15_VALUE
    ,LEVEL15.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL15_NAME
    ,LEVEL16.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL16_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL16.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL16_VALUE
    ,LEVEL16.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL16_NAME
    ,LEVEL17.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL17_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL17.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL17_VALUE
    ,LEVEL17.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL17_NAME
    ,LEVEL18.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL18_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL18.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL18_VALUE
    ,LEVEL18.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL18_NAME
    ,LEVEL19.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL19_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL19.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL19_VALUE
    ,LEVEL19.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL19_NAME
    ,LEVEL20.NODE_ID AS NODE_LEVEL20_ID_INT
    ,LEVEL20.NODE_VALUE  AS NODE_LEVEL20_VALUE
    ,LEVEL20.NODE_DESC   AS NODE_LEVEL20_NAME 
  FROM        
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=1) LEVEL1
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=2) LEVEL2
 ON LEVEL1.NODE_ID=LEVEL2.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=3) LEVEL3
 ON LEVEL2.NODE_ID=LEVEL3.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=4) LEVEL4
 ON LEVEL3.NODE_ID=LEVEL4.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=5) LEVEL5
 ON LEVEL4.NODE_ID=LEVEL5.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=6) LEVEL6
 ON LEVEL5.NODE_ID=LEVEL6.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=7) LEVEL7
 ON LEVEL6.NODE_ID=LEVEL7.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=8) LEVEL8
 ON LEVEL7.NODE_ID=LEVEL8.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=9) LEVEL9
 ON LEVEL8.NODE_ID=LEVEL9.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=10) LEVEL10
 ON LEVEL9.NODE_ID=LEVEL10.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=11) LEVEL11
 ON LEVEL10.NODE_ID=LEVEL11.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=12) LEVEL12
 ON LEVEL11.NODE_ID=LEVEL12.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=13) LEVEL13
 ON LEVEL12.NODE_ID=LEVEL13.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=14) LEVEL14
 ON LEVEL13.NODE_ID=LEVEL14.PARENT_NODE_ID
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=15) LEVEL15
 ON LEVEL14.NODE_ID=LEVEL15.PARENT_NODE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=16) LEVEL16
 ON LEVEL15.NODE_ID=LEVEL16.PARENT_NODE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=17) LEVEL17
 ON LEVEL16.NODE_ID=LEVEL17.PARENT_NODE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=18) LEVEL18
 ON LEVEL17.NODE_ID=LEVEL18.PARENT_NODE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=19) LEVEL19
 ON LEVEL18.NODE_ID=LEVEL19.PARENT_NODE_ID
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  
 (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_ODS_SI_HIER_PUBLISHED_MGMT WHERE LEVEL_NO=20) LEVEL20
 ON LEVEL19.NODE_ID=LEVEL20.PARENT_NODE_ID 
) RMGMTH
WHERE  EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT NFD
                    WHERE     NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE  =  RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
                          AND NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
                           )
and  not exists ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.R_MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY RMH
                    WHERE     RMH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE  =  RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE
                          AND RMH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE = RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
                          )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CODE, RMGMTH.FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
ORDER BY  RMGMTH.DV_REPORTING_LEVEL_NUM_INT   DESC)  =1
